title: Disembark Locations
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM Disembark WHERE SRV = 0 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(NearestDestination_Localised, StationName, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM Disembark WHERE SRV = 0 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} on-foot disembark(s) recorded during the report period. Where you choose to go on foot is where the action is — frequent surface settlement disembarks mark a ground operative; lots of station disembarks suggest engineering visits, bar missions, or social stops at humanity's gathering points.
details.help: Disembark SRV = 0 filters to on-foot exits (not SRV deployments). NearestDestination_Localised or StationName is the location. total drives the title.

tagLines: On-foot disembark location log compiled. Ground deployment destination breakdown noted.
Every disembark is a choice to put yourself somewhere with no ship beneath you. Those choices tell a story.
Surface settlements at the top means operative work. Station bars means something more comfortable.
